content.en:
Ye Tian took out an ancestral medicine and refined it little by little.

Rumble!!!

The domain body made rapid progress under the energy refining of the ancestral medicine, and it was many times faster than his own penance.

"This cultivation speed is too fast!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

No wonder the ancestral medicine is so precious, if there is no ancestral medicine, he estimates that it will take hundreds of millions of years to improve his cultivation to the realm of ordinary domain consummation, and with the help of the time array and many ordinary resources, he can be promoted to the realm of ordinary domain consummation within hundreds of millions of years.

But now it's different, with this ancestral medicine, within tens of thousands of years, he will be sure to refine the ordinary domain body to the consummation realm.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already refined one-tenth of this ancestral medicine, and his cultivation had already been raised to the realm of ordinary domain consummation.

"Underestimating a Ancestral Medicine, my foundation is so deep, one-tenth of the Ancestral Medicine has raised my cultivation to the Ordinary Domain Body Perfection Realm. If it is refined by other ordinary domain ancestors, I am afraid that it will be able to make hundreds of domain ancestors or even more domain ancestors improve their cultivation to the consummation realm of ordinary domain ancestors. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The ordinary domain body was perfect, Ye Tian did not continue to refine the ancestral medicine, because his cultivation had been improved to the current limit, and if he continued to cultivate, he would need to let the ordinary domain body undergo a transformation and evolve into an elite domain body.

But after all, Ye Tian used the ancestral medicine to improve his cultivation, and his cultivation was not very stable, and his domain power was not very pure.

Therefore, he must stabilize his realm and refine his domain power.

Moreover, his soul still hasn't kept up with his cultivation, and he still needs to constantly refine his soul.

In this way, he could continue to impact the Elite Domain Ancestor Realm without causing an unstable foundation.

So, Ye Tian didn't continue to cultivate, but went out.

And during this period of time, Ye Tian's wife and son have also made great progress, and they have entered the Domain Ancestor level, and with the help of the ancestral medicine given by Ye Tian, they have raised their cultivation to the Ordinary Domain Body Consummation Level one by one, that is, the Ordinary Domain Ancestor Consummation Realm, which is only one step away from the Elite Domain Ancestor.

And their holy bodies are relatively strong, and they have all reached the realm of Dacheng, which is very close to the level of consummation.

Therefore, their strength is not much stronger than the ordinary domain ancestors in the realm, which is enough to compare with some weaker elite domain ancestors.

For them, this kind of cultivation strength was enough to protect themselves in the Dao Mountain Realm.

In fact, Ye Tian could also do his best to cultivate his family, but it was not necessary.

He won't interfere too much in their cultivation now, and it is all up to them to reach what level they can rise, and he doesn't care about anything other than the occasional resource.

Anyway, if he is there, even if he encounters a strong enemy in the future, he can protect his family.

this day.

A half-step domain ancestor of the Nine Extremes Legion came to report the news, saying that the Terran had discovered that many domain ancestors had come from the Dark Forbidden Domain one after another and entered the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

And.

There are also some more domain boundaries in the Daoshan Realm, and it is obvious that there is a Domain Ancestor who has brought the Domain Realm from the Divine Heaven Realm to the Daoshan Realm at a huge cost.

"It seems that the domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm are really migrating over in large numbers, and even these domain realms have been brought in. In the future, the situation in the Daoshan Realm will be completely changed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

-------------------

A dark forbidden area near the Daoshan Realm.

A huge domain realm was slowly coming towards the Dao Mountain realm under the support of a giant tortoise.

The strength of this giant tortoise is not weak, but it is a forbidden creature, and it is a tamed forbidden creature, and its strength is comparable to that of a top domain ancestor, otherwise, there is no way to easily support a domain to move forward in the dark forbidden domain.

When this giant tortoise appeared in the Daoshan Realm with the domain boundary, it attracted the attention of many people.

"It's the legendary Fu Turtle Domain of the Divine Heaven Realm, this is the Domain Realm of the Feather Domain Ancestor!"

"The Fu Turtle Domain Realm has been wandering in the dark forbidden realm near the Divine Heaven Realm, but I didn't expect to come to the Divine Heaven Realm as well!"

"If the ancestor of the Feather Domain doesn't come, it won't work, once the Divine Heaven Realm falls into silence, the nearby territories will be chaotic, and they must stay away from the Divine Heaven Realm. Moreover, if he didn't escape, he would not be an opponent at that time, when a large number of forbidden creatures were ushered in. Besides, he really survived from the silence of the realm, without the realm, he couldn't wander in the dark forbidden realm with his own domain? Now relying on the forbidden realm and the divine heaven realm, he can trace the coordinates. Once the Divine Heaven Realm is gone, he can't even lock the coordinates, then he is really lost!"

"It is rumored that the strength of the Feather Domain Ancestor is infinitely close to that of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and its strength far exceeds that of other top domain masters, and it can be said that it has the top three combat power, I don't know if it's true?"

"Whether it's true or not, it's not an existence we can provoke!"

Top domain ancestors like Feather Domain Ancestors appeared one by one next.

The Divine Heaven Realm has ten top domain ancestor-level overlords, but in fact, these ten overlords are not real overlords, they are just overlords on the surface.

The years of existence of the Divine Heaven Realm are too old, in fact, there may have been a Supreme Domain Ancestor in history, but he left the Divine Heaven Realm early and entered the Dark Sacred Domain.

Of course, whether those Supreme Domain Ancestors are dead or alive, then it is impossible to say.

And for such a long time, some of the ancient top domain ancestors fell into a deep sleep due to boredom, and naturally no one knew about their existence.

Therefore, the Domain Ancestor, who was even more powerful than the Ten Overlords, would naturally exist.

For example, the Feather Domain Ancestor is one of them.

With the passage of time, there were more and more domain boundaries in the Daoshan Realm, and there were even many domain ancestors who united to build domain ancestors.

All of a sudden, the realm of Daoshan became very prosperous, ushering in a prosperous era of cultivation.

But no matter how powerful the other realms were, they couldn't compare to the Xuanxuan Forbidden Realm.

The Xuanxu Forbidden Realm has the largest number of Domain Ancestors, and because of the Battle Realm Tower, all the Domain Ancestors will occupy a small place in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, so as to facilitate access to the War Realm Tower.

The War Realm Tower is a place where you can connect to the Dark Sanctuary, and you can even get the inheritance of the Dark Sanctuary, which is a supreme opportunity for the top domain ancestors!

this day.

Ye Tian received an invitation from a group of top domain ancestors, and anyone who could participate in this meeting was a top domain ancestor combat power.

However, he is an exception.

Because he had killed the top domain ancestor of the Divine Heaven Realm at the level of the Returning One Realm, he was naturally qualified to receive this invitation.

More importantly, Ye Tian is a person from the Daoshan Realm, and he is regarded as the representative of the Daoshan Realm.

Originally, Ye Tian didn't really want to participate in such a meeting, but when he thought that his foundation was here, and his family was also here, unless he completely destroyed these domain ancestors, he would inevitably deal with them in the future, or his own family would deal with them.

Therefore, it is indeed necessary to participate in such a meeting.
